facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this one. A pure veg Indian restaurant in Phu Quoc, sitting quietly near Cầu Bà Phong, pulling a 4.8-star rating from the people who actually found it. No meat on the menu. No tourists at the tables. Just solid, consistent Indian food on an island where that should not be possible. If you're vegetarian and heading to Phu Quoc, save this now. You'll thank yourself later.
facebook.video_caption: Pure veg Indian food in Phu Quoc. 4.8 stars. Almost nobody knows it's here. Watch this before you book your meals.
